author: 0xunclebill
content: just an fyi if you're trying to run the lighthouse epbs branch you'll also need to include this flag `--epochs-per-migration 99999`

author: barnabasbusa
content: can you explain what is this flag doing? It sounds like a hack for now?

author: 0xunclebill
content: We haven’t updated our cold db to handle post block vs post payload envelope states yet. This flag prevents LH from migrating data to the cold db.

author: 0xunclebill
content: you might see an uptick in disk space usage because of this. but this should be negligible for short lived devnets

author: barnabasbusa
content: added it to to the notes page so ppl are aware of this

author: ethdreamer
content: Are other clients planning to blind their payloads to save disk space and rely on `engine_getPayloadBodiesBy*` to reconstruct them?

content: Blinding payloads to save disk space
